body:
### Changes made

* Added persistent buffering for partial streamed chunks
* Split SSE events using `\n\n`
* Preserved incomplete chunk data between reads
* Prevented JSON.parse failures when payload spans multiple network chunks
* Added safer parsing error handling

### Testing

* Tested ticket submission flow
* Verified AI processing stream parsing behavior
* Confirmed final response handling works correctly


<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

## Summary by CodeRabbit

## Release Notes

* **Bug Fixes**
  * Improved error handling and recovery during AI analysis processing with enhanced fallback mechanisms
  * Added intelligent detection for backend connectivity issues with automatic recovery attempts
  * Enhanced streaming response reliability for real-time analysis updates
  * Better error messaging and navigation when analysis encounters issues

<!-- review_stack_entry_start -->

[![Review Change Stack](https://storage.googleapis.com/coderabbit_public_assets/review-stack-in-coderabbit-ui.svg)](https://app.coderabbit.ai/change-stack/ritesh-1918/HELPDESK.AI/pull/37?utm_source=github_walkthrough&utm_medium=github&utm_campaign=change_stack)

comments.body:
@DHEVIKA is attempting to deploy a commit to the **ritesh** Team on [Vercel](https://vercel.com).

A member of the Team first needs to [authorize it](https://vercel.com/git/authorize?team=ritesh&slug=ritesh-1918&teamId=team_qa5DQgHjCoaK4byyXuslEOov&type=github&job=%7B%22headInfo%22%3A%7B%22sha%22%3A%22ac383b1f5ddfa05db0f0f28df9ec6462e8dc573c%22%7D%2C%22id%22%3A%22QmVEZpaCqUXJarLqw6rGNXPeBZrtm4nbUtWSR3HG4F38Px%22%2C%22org%22%3A%22ritesh-1918%22%2C%22prId%22%3A37%2C%22repo%22%3A%22HELPDESK.AI%22%7D).

­ƒôØ Walkthrough ## Walkthrough AIProcessing.jsx refactors SSE backend integration from per-chunk parsing to buffered event parsing, reorganizes imports, maintains Supabase image uploads, and adds network-aware error fallback with adjusted navigation timing. ## Changes **Buffered SSE Parsing and Error Resilience** |Layer / File(s)|Summary| |---|---| |**Import cleanup**
`Frontend/src/user/pages/AIProcessing.jsx`|Removes unused `axios` import and separates router hook imports into a dedicated statement.| |**Image upload to Supabase storage**
`Frontend/src/user/pages/AIProcessing.jsx`|Maintains optional base64 image upload to Supabase with content-type generation, Blob conversion, timestamped per-user filename, and public URL derivation for request payload.| |**Buffered SSE streaming and payload construction**
`Frontend/src/user/pages/AIProcessing.jsx`|Rewrites SSE handling to read chunks via `getReader()`, accumulate in a buffer, split events on double-newlines, parse JSON from `data:` lines, update `activeStep` from streamed `step` values, capture `finalTicket` on `done`, and parse leftover buffer at stream end. Request payload now includes `company`, `image_url`, and AI/settings thresholds.| |**Error handling and fallback recovery**
`Frontend/src/user/pages/AIProcessing.jsx`|In catch block, detects network/backend-startup errors and generates local fallback ticket with `reasoning` text; unrecognized errors show toast and redirect to `/create-ticket`. Sets fallback fields (`duplicate_ticket`, `confidence`, `needs_review`) and adjusts navigation timing to 500ms for both success and fallback paths.| ## Sequence Diagram ```mermaid sequenceDiagram participant AIProcessing participant Backend participant StreamReader participant EventBuffer participant Parser AIProcessing->>Backend: POST with payload (text, company, image_url) Backend->>StreamReader: Send streaming response (SSE) loop Read chunks StreamReader->>EventBuffer: Accumulate decoded chunk EventBuffer->>Parser: Split on blank lines Parser->>Parser: Parse data: JSON line Parser->>AIProcessing: Update activeStep end Parser->>AIProcessing: Capture finalTicket on step=done StreamReader->>EventBuffer: Stream ends EventBuffer->>Parser: Parse remaining buffer ``` ## Estimated code review effort ­ƒÄ» 4 (Complex) | ÔÅ▒´©Å ~45 minutes ## Possibly related issues - [`#27`](https://github.com/ritesh-1918/HELPDESK.AI/issues/27): Buffered SSE parsing implementation directly addresses the split-chunk SSE event parsing bug, accumulating chunks and properly parsing complete events on double-newlines. ## Poem > ­ƒÉ░ A stream splits and buffers take flight, > Events no longer scattered in the night, > Each chunk now waits in lined-up care, > While fallback safety lingers near, > The parser hops through SSE with delight! title: Fixed SSE streaming response parsing issue in AIProcessing.jsx.
